content: He arose to his feet, and baring his bosom, looked steadily on the keen, glittering knife, that was already upheld by his inexorable judge.
style_prompt: A man's deep voice adds depth to his natural speech style, with an average speaking speed and vigor.

content: Every eye was simultaneously bent on his person, as if to inquire into the truth or falsehood of the declaration, with an intelligence and keenness that caused the subject of their scrutiny to tremble for the result.
style_prompt: A man with a deep, rich voice speaks naturally and with a normal speaking speed and energy.

content: A short and sullen pause succeeded this bold assertion.
style_prompt: His voice, characterized by a low pitch, maintains a soothing tone as he speaks with ordinary energy.
